issues.impact: No automated builds, tests, or deployments
issues.recommendation: Implement GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive pipeline

issues.description: No test runner or test files detected
issues.impact: No quality assurance for code changes
issues.recommendation: Set up Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E

issues.description: No automated quality checks in CI
issues.impact: Code quality issues can reach production
issues.recommendation: Implement lint, typecheck, and test gates

issues.impact: Manual deployments prone to human error
issues.recommendation: Set up automated deployment with Vercel/Netlify

issues.impact: Unknown code quality and test effectiveness
issues.recommendation: Configure coverage reporting with minimum 80% threshold

issues.description: TypeScript compilation not enforced in CI
issues.impact: Type errors can slip into production builds
issues.recommendation: Add 'tsc --noEmit' to CI pipeline

issues.description: ESLint not enforced in CI pipeline
issues.impact: Code style inconsistencies and potential bugs
issues.recommendation: Enforce ESLint with zero warnings policy

issues.impact: Accessibility regressions may go unnoticed
issues.recommendation: Implement Lighthouse CI with accessibility checks

issues.impact: Performance regressions can degrade user experience
issues.recommendation: Set up Lighthouse CI with performance thresholds

issues.impact: Inconsistent versioning and human error
issues.recommendation: Implement automated semantic versioning

issues.impact: Changelog may become outdated or inconsistent
issues.recommendation: Automate changelog generation from commit messages

issues.description: No automated git tagging for releases
issues.impact: Difficult to track releases and rollbacks
issues.recommendation: Automate git tagging in release process

issues.impact: Inconsistent and error-prone releases
issues.recommendation: Document and automate release checklist

issues.impact: Cannot quickly recover from bad deployments
issues.recommendation: Implement automated rollback triggers and procedures

issues.impact: Broken deployments may go undetected
issues.recommendation: Implement automated smoke tests

issues.impact: Difficult to review changes before merge
issues.recommendation: Set up automated preview deployments for PRs

issues.impact: Production errors may go unnoticed
issues.recommendation: Integrate Sentry or similar error tracking

issues.impact: Performance degradation may go undetected
issues.recommendation: Set up Core Web Vitals monitoring

issues.impact: Downtime may not be detected quickly
issues.recommendation: Set up uptime monitoring with alerts

issues.impact: Vulnerable dependencies may be deployed
issues.recommendation: Add npm audit and security scanning to CI

issues.description: No HTTPS enforcement verified in CI
issues.impact: Potential security misconfigurations
issues.recommendation: Add security headers validation to tests

issues.description: No bundle size analysis in CI
issues.impact: Bundle size regressions may go unnoticed
issues.recommendation: Add bundle analyzer to build process

issues.impact: Suboptimal production builds
issues.recommendation: Add build optimization checks

immediate_actions: Set up basic GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline
short_term: Set up Lighthouse CI for performance/accessibility
long_term: Optimize build process and bundle analysis

compliance.gap_analysis: Cannot meet SLA requirements without monitoring and alerting infrastructure
